subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Identify the situation in the dialogue passage
Answer questions based on the scene

sections.heading: Passage Focus
sections.content: The dialogue concerns Titi, whose parents want to choose a husband for her while she loves someone else. They try to persuade her to accept their choice, but she refuses.

sections.heading: Learning Tasks
sections.content: Identify the situation in the dialogue passage. Read dialogue for understanding. Answer questions based on the scene.
